_comment: Hand-authored upstream ResearchOutput fixture (joined output of all 4 research subagents) for traffic-1. Anchored on golden-case expected.research where possible. Used as upstream context for synthesis + audit suites.

evidence_items.description: Camera calibration certificate dated 1 Oct 2025 showing 99.6% solid-line discrimination accuracy.
Driver dashcam footage purportedly showing obscured lane markings.

facts.description: On 3 Oct 2025 at 14:32:15 vehicle SJK 4521E crossed a solid white line at Tampines Ave 4 Junction 12.

timeline.description: TC-TA4-0892 calibration completed by LTA Field Operations.
Alleged improper lane change captured by camera TC-TA4-0892.

legal_rules.applicability: Applies to vehicles crossing solid lane markings on public roads.

legal_rules.text: Camera calibration standard for traffic enforcement.
legal_rules.applicability: Sets accuracy thresholds for camera-derived evidence.

precedents.case_name: Public Prosecutor v Khong Hor Hee
precedents.holding: Camera evidence is admissible where calibration is properly documented.
precedents.relevance_rationale: Directly addresses admissibility of camera-derived evidence under RTA Schedule 9.

precedent_source_metadata.query: improper lane change Singapore camera calibration

legal_elements_checklist.element: Vehicle crossed a solid lane marking
legal_elements_checklist.rationale: Camera footage corroborated by calibration cert.

legal_elements_checklist.element: Markings were visible at moment of crossing
legal_elements_checklist.rationale: LTA enforcement summary states junction line was unobscured.
